⭐ STAR UPGRADE

HOW IT WORKS
Upgrading stars requires duplicate pulls of the same character + gold.
Each star boosts ATK, DEF, and SPD permanently.
★1 1 dup + 2.5k   ★2 2 dups + 5k   ★3 3 dups + 10k   ★4 4 dups + 20k
★5 5 dups + 40k   ★6 6 dups + 75k   ★7 7 dups + 150k
